scope: Cycle 15: Bug hunt C14 (merlin_card_system.gd faction boost_weight) + feat run_history + echo_memory + run counters
overall_assessment: Cycle 15: Bug hunt C14 found 0 bugs — _get_card_factions extracts factions from ADD_REPUTATION effects correctly, _get_faction_boost returns 1.0/3.0 based on rep threshold, weighted selection in fastroute and event generators handles boost correctly. Feature: run_history population implemented — 9-field entries (biome, cards_played, victory, life_at_end, dominant_faction, minigames_won, oghams_used, anam_earned, timestamp) appended at run end, capped at 50. echo_memory tracks deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, choices_log (100 cap). New run state counters minigames_won and oghams_used properly incremented. 25 total bugs fixed across 15 cycles.
